title: ephemerantha schistoglossa
intro: Ephemerantha schistoglossa, also known as Schistostega osmundoides, is a rare, flowering plant native to New Caledonia. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include antifungal and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ephemerantha schistoglossa are said to include relief from skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as potential anti-inflammatory effects. Herbal preparations of Ephemerantha schistoglossa are typically made from the leaves and stems of the plant, which are either dried and powdered or made into teas and infusions.
